title: Spicy Thai Tofu Stir-Fry
description: A spicy and flavorful stir-fry made with tofu, Thai chili peppers, and a blend of aromatic spices.

ingredients.name: mildly spicy oil
ingredients.notes: such as vegetable oil with a pinch of cayenne pepper

instructions: In a small bowl, whisk together mildly spicy oil, fish sauce, brown sugar, and rice vinegar (if using). Set aside.
In a large skillet or wok, heat 1 tablespoon of mildly spicy oil over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced Thai chili peppers and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add the chopped kanom and ko and cook until they start to soften, about 2 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and chopped shallots and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add the pressed tofu and cook until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes.
Pour the prepared sauce into the skillet and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened and the tofu is coated.
Serve immediately over steamed rice or noodles.
